content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Login-gated app (SecureField in LoginView.swift:9) ships placeholder demo credentials and notes: `demo_user.txt` = "test", `demo_password.txt` = "changeme", `notes.txt` = "TBD".
Pierre: Apple reviewers must be able to sign in and reach your core features, so login-gated apps need working demo credentials and clear steps — placeholders are a common cause of "unable to review" rejections. Here all three files are non-actionable stubs (`test`/`changeme`/`TBD`) that won't authenticate and don't explain how to reach any gated functionality. Replace them with a real working account and step-by-step notes before submitting.
